personality.writing_style: Enthusiastic and personal, uses exclamation marks liberally
personality.communication_style: Warm but awkward, tries too hard to be liked, uses movie quotes
quirks: Calls unnecessary meetings to share personal anecdotes
Sends 'That's what she said' in Teams at least once daily
Signs emails with inspirational quotes he misattributes
Schedules 'fun runs' and 'office olympics' nobody asked for
Replies-all to company-wide emails with personal commentary

work_preferences.lunch_behavior: Orders from the same pizza place every day, invites everyone

about_me: World's Best Boss (self-awarded). Believes he is the heart and soul of the office. Has been at the company for 15 years and considers every employee family.

metadata.signal_behavior: High volume, low substance. Generates lots of email/Teams traffic with minimal actionable content - perfect for signal testing.
